hardware: H100 (SM 9.0) — TBD exact SKU (owner T18: PCIe / SXM / NVL and VRAM)
measurement_source: TBD (owner T18: tools/parity/cuda_rtf_variance.sh --fa-mode {decomposed|v2|v3}, N=10 each, ONE host)
gate_status_note: H100 is a REFERENCE measurement surface only — the formal RTF gate (median > baseline * 1.05 || median > 0.10) stays on the RTX 4090 baseline (docs/perf/cuda-large-v3-baseline.json, M2-14 self-hosted runner + M3-01 5% regression). H100 numbers must NEVER be merged into that file: mixing hardware generations breaks the regression judgment (M4-07 spec T14).

v3.note: --fa-mode v3 sets VOKRA_CUDA_FA_V3_ENCODER=1 so the encoder self-attention (t_q = 1500, the FA v3 battleground) is exposed e2e; the decoder steady state (t_q = 1) stays below FA_V3_MIN_TQ = 64 by design (FA v2 honest-negative inheritance).

kernel_level_comparison.workload: flash_attn_v3_dev vs flash_attn_dev vs decomposed attn chain, d_head=64, n_head=4, causal + non-causal, t_q = t_kv in {64, 448, 1500}
kernel_level_comparison.reference_expectation_note: The research §10 '2-3x on Hopper' figure applies to THIS kernel-level face only — it is a reference figure, NOT an acceptance criterion (milestones §8 M4-07 row), and it must not be compared against the e2e RTF face above. An honest below-2x (or negative) result still closes the WP by being recorded.

parity_recorded_max_abs_delta.causal: TBD (owner T17: eprintln output of flash_attn_v3_causal_vs_decomposed_f32)
parity_recorded_max_abs_delta.atol_note: FA_V3_PARITY_ATOL = 0.02 is the tf32 architectural-bound pre-registration (fa_v3.rs rustdoc + ADR M4-07 (d)). Measured > 0.02 => hand back to CC (no quiet atol bump); measured comfortably <= 0.01 => tighten to the FA v2 value in a follow-up.

notes: Scaffolded by M4-07-T14 with explicit TBD placeholders — fabricated values are forbidden; the owner fills every TBD from the T17/T18 H100 run.
Dashboard registration (X-06 nightly results surface) of the FA v2 comparison row is the WP-close trigger (milestones §8 M4-07 completion condition, second half).
FA_V3_MIN_TQ = 64 calibration and the per-path parity atol confirmation are follow-ups fed by this file's measurements.
